title: Notification for delegation of powers under section 247 of CA 2013 to Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India
description: Notification for delegation of powers under section 247 of CA 2013 to Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India
file_title: Notification for delegation of powers under section 247 of CA 2013 to Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India.pdf
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 EXTRAORDINARY II— — (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY 2980] No. 2980] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, OCTOBER 23, 2017/KARTIKA 1, 1939 कारपोरेट कार्य मंत्रालर् अधिसूचना नई दिल्ली, 23 अक्तूबर, 2017 का.आ. 3401(अ).—केन्द्रीर् सरकार , कंपनी अधिधनर्म, 2013 (2013 का 18) की िारा 458 द्व ारा प्र ित्त शधक्तर्ों का प्रर् ोग करते हु ए उक्त अधिधनर्म की िारा 247 के अिीन स् वर्ं में धवधित शधक्तर्ों और कार्ों को भा रतीर् दिवाला और शोिन अक्षमता बोर्य को इस शतय के अध्र्ािीन प्रत्र् ार्ोधित करती िै दक र् दि केन्द्र सरकार का मत िो दक ऐसा करना लोकधित में आवश्र्क िै तो, शधक्तर्ों के इस प्रत्र् ार्ोिन को रद्द कर सकती िै र् ा उक्त िारा के अिीन शधक्तर्ों का प्रर् ोग स् वर्ं कर सकती िै। 2. र् ि अ धिसूचना रािपत्र में इसके प्र काशन की तारीख से प्र वृत्त िोगी। [फा.सं.1/27/2013-सीएल-V(भाग-I)] अमरिीप ससंि भाटटर्ा , संर्ुक्त सधचव MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd October, 2017 S.O. 3401 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 458 of the Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013), the Central Government hereby delegates the powers and functions vested in it under section 247 of the said Act to the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India, subject to the condition that the Central Government may revoke such delegation of powers or it may exercise the powers under the said section, if in its opinion such a course of action is necessary in the public interest. 2. This notification shall come into force with effect from the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [F. No. 1/27/2013-CL-V(Part-I)] AMARDEEP SINGH BHATIA, Jt. Secy. 6351 GI/2017 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
